title: KitchenCraft Umbrella Food Cover, Fine Mesh Food Protector, White Collapsible Mesh Screen Tent for BBQs, Picnics, Buffets, Kitchens and Outdoors, 40cm
features: EASY POP UP: Quickly locks into place with a pull string and secure toggle loop to prevent accidental collapse during use.
GREAT FOR OUTDOORS: Made from breathable mesh to keep food ventilated while protecting it from insects, dust, and debris.
STRONG AND ATTRACTIVE: Strong metal wire frame paired with a clean white mesh finish offers reliable protection and a neat appearance.
MULTI-PURPOSE: Perfect for shielding sandwiches, snacks, cakes, and meats at barbecues, buffets, picnics, and parties.
FOLDABLE AND PORTABLE: Folds down flat for hassle-free storage and easy transportation, great for picnics and outdoor gatherings.
description: From the manufacturer The definitive kitchenware brand. KitchenCraft is the definitive kitchenware brand, with more than 1,300 everyday kitchen essentials to help you cook, bake and decorate. KitchenCraft Medium Umbrella-Style Food Protector Dome (40.5 cm) Keep your favourite foods fresh and fly-free with this umbrella-style food cover Nothing ruins a buffet like a bluebottle sampling your sandwiches before you do. Ants and picnics make for a dismaying mix too. And forget leaving that birthday cake out on the table where dust and debris are sure to ruin your impeccable decorating job. Here’s a quick fix for all these horror scenarios. Slip your plate under this umbrella-shaped food net cover, and you’ll keep all the bugs and bits at bay. The folding design opens up easily by threading the toggle on the top through the neighbouring loop, and it then clicks in place thanks to a locking mechanism. Once you’ve finished using it, you can collapse it down again for easy storage – just like a real brolly! Diameter: 40.5 cm (1 foot, 4 inches) Height of dome: 24 cm (9½ inches) Height of dome with toggle: 27.5 cm (11 inches) Wipes clean Not suitable to cover barbeques Features Great for buffets, picnics and barbecues The polyester mesh sides are designed to keep your food safe from common culinary nightmares such as dust, flies and unsavoury splatters, while still allowing fresh air to get through so that the food can ventilate (and guests can see the snacks on offer!). It’s particularly good for outdoor dining situations, like picnics and barbecues, where hungry bugs are always looking for a bite. Suitable for hot or cold food This medium-sized food dome is suitable for use with hot and cold food, so you can bring it out to save the day whenever you’ve got a recipe on the go. It’s great for cooling cupcakes before icing, letting your bacon cool so you can add it to an avocado salad, or waiting for your guests to arrive when entertaining. Easy to handle (and easy on the eye) With its frilly lace edging, this cute, tent-like food cover will look great on your table or picnic blanket. It’s easy to remove when you’re ready to serve, or for guests to lift and replace as they work their way through your delicious buffet. More Features Sets up in seconds To assemble the food protector, simply pop the cover up using the toggle and loop on the top and click in to place with the locking mechanism. Compact storage Once you’ve finished, collapse the whole thing just like a real umbrella and stow it away in the cupboard ready for next time. Robust design This food umbrella is made of metal wire, with sturdy polyester netting. You can rely on it for picnic after picnic. Other sizes available At 40.5 cm (16 inches) wide, this model is ideal for covering large cakes or medium-sized platters. For even more versatility, check out the 30.5 cm (12-inch) and 51 cm (20-inch) versions. About KitchenCraft The definitive kitchenware brand. Since 1850, KitchenCraft has designed, manufactured and supplied thousands of cooking utensils, tools and gadgets, each playing an important role in the kitchens of customers across the UK. With more than 1,000 products to choose from, there’s always a KitchenCraft product you can rely on - from essentials for every day to the exceptional.
